title: Mighty Arabian Mozzarella Balls Skewers
description: A bold, charcoal charred snack that blends creamy mozzarella with fragrant Middle Eastern spices, perfect for flexitarian gatherings.

ingredients.name: Wooden skewers
ingredients.notes: soaked in water to prevent burning

instructions: Preheat a charcoal grill to high heat and brush the grates with olive oil to prevent sticking.
In a bowl, toss the mozzarella balls with olive oil, za'atar, smoked paprika, lemon zest, and rosemary until evenly coated.
Thread 3-4 mozzarella pearls onto each soaked skewer to allow space for char marks.
Place the skewers across the grill grates, turning every 2 minutes, until the mozzarella develops a golden char and a fragrant aroma, about 8-10 minutes.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let them rest for 2 minutes to allow the cheese to firm slightly.
Drizzle a little extra olive oil over the hot skewers for extra shine.
Sprinkle a pinch of sea salt and freshly ground black pepper over the skewers to taste.
Serve immediately with a side of cucumber-tomato salad and a drizzle of tahini dip.
Garnish with a sprig of fresh rosemary for a touch of color and aroma.
Enjoy the smoky, yeasty, and snappy flavors of this Arabian-inspired snack.
